description_long: This is a vintage-style electric fan with a robust, cylindrical green metal base and a tall, narrow neck supporting the motor housing. The fan features four large, metallic blades with a slightly curved design, encased in a gold-colored wire guard that is both decorative and functional. The guard is composed of concentric rings and wavy radial supports, providing protection while allowing airflow. A visible power cord with a plug extends from the base, and a small tag is attached to the cord. The motor housing has a metallic nameplate and two protruding knobs or fasteners on either side. The overall construction suggests durability and a classic industrial aesthetic, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or retro-themed urban interiors.
description: A vintage green metal electric fan with four large metallic blades, encased in a gold wire guard and mounted on a sturdy base. The fan features a visible power cord and a classic industrial design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical green base, tall neck, and the profile of the metallic blades within the gold wire guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the four large metallic blades, the concentric gold wire guard, and the central hub of the fan.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the power cord and plug more visible, as well as the side of the motor housing.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the motor housing with ventilation holes, the base, and the attached power cord.
attribute_blade_guard_design: The blade guard is made of gold-colored metal wires arranged in concentric rings with wavy radial supports, forming an open frame that protects the blades while allowing airflow.
